def negative_structured_log_record_missing_trace_or_correlation_id():
    rule_id = "structured_log_record_missing_trace_or_correlation_id"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Structured log record in a request handler lacks trace_id or request_id for distributed tracing."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
